message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
hide circle

class KinematicModelClient {
    updateKinematics(): void
}

class RoutePlanningClient {
    updateRoute(): void
}

class PositionSensor {
    position: Position
    resourceId:int = 1
    
    getPosition(): struct Position
    setPosition(p: struct Position): void
    lockDyadic(): int
    releaseDyadic(): void
}

class VelocitySensor {
    velocity: Velocity
    resourceID:int = 2
    
    getVelocity(): struct Position
    setVelocity(p: struct Position): void
    lockDyadic(): int
    releaseDyadic(): void
}

class AltitudeSensor {
    altitude: Alttitude
    resourceID:int = 2
    
    getAltitude(): struct Position
    setAltitute(p: struct Position): void
    lockDyadic(): int
    releaseDyadic(): void
}

class ResourceList {
    rIDList: int rIDList[20]
    nIDs: int = 0
    
    isInOrder(rID:int):char
    addLock(rID:int):int
    removeLock(rID:int):void
}

class Mutex <<C>> 

note "Mutex" as N_Mutex #lightgreen;line:green;text:black;bold;fontName=Arial,Noto Sans CJK SC,sans-serif;;fontColor=#3465a4;background:#ffffff;border:none;margin-top:-8px;left-margin:+79;top-margin:+10;width:auto;height:auto;z-index=-1


' Relationships from clients to sensors
KinematicModelClient --> PositionSensor : 
KinematicModelClient --> VelocitySensor : 
KinematicModelClient --> AltitudeSensor : 

RoutePlanningClient --> PositionSensor : 
RoutePlanningClient --> VelocitySensor : 
RoutePlanningClient --> AltitudeSensor : 


PositionSensor --> ResourceList : 
VelocitySensor --> ResourceList : 
AltitudeSensor --> ResourceList : 

ResourceList -right-> Mutex : 

N_Mutex ..> Mutex : ' Connect note back to actual mutex for positioning reference



@enduml
